/usr/local/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libQtColorWidgets-Qt52.so.2 -o libQtColorWidgets-Qt52.so.2.0.0 CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/QtColorWidgets_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/abstract_widget_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/bound_color_selector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_2d_slider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_delegate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_line_edit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_list_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_names.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_palette.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_palette_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_palette_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_preview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_selector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/color_wheel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/gradient_slider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/hue_slider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/src/QtColorWidgets/swatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgets.dir/QtColorWidgets_autogen/CRZPDLJRNK/qrc_color_widgets.cpp.o /usr/lib64/libQt5Widgets.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Gui.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Core.so.5.9.2
